title: Comments should not be empty
description: Comments should not be emptyAnalyze your codeintentionality-clearmaintainabilityCode SmellWhy is this an issue?Empty comments, as shown in the example, hurt readability and might indicate an oversight.// /* */ /// /** */Some meaningful text should be added to the comment, or the comment markers should be removed.Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CI©2025SonarSource Sàrl. All rights reserved.Privacy Policy|Cookie Policy|Terms of Use
recommendation: Remove the problematic code and refactor as needed.

never_trigger_on: Not applicable - targets comment nodes only
logic.reasoning: Detects empty comment markers (// with only whitespace, /* */ with only whitespace, /// empty). Scans source for comment patterns and checks if they contain only whitespace. Empty comments hurt readability and may indicate oversight. Rule directly processes source text to find all comment patterns.

should_not_trigger:
// This is a comment
void Method() { }
